fieldValues.value: tombstone reference-only state: absent content file is valid

A `sourceDocumentIndex` entry whose content file (at `contentPath`) is absent is a valid tombstone (reference-only) state. A conformant implementation MUST NOT reject, refuse to load, or refuse to export a repository solely because an indexed source document's content is missing. An `attaches` `SourceReference` targeting a tombstoned `documentId` remains conformant (I-102). An implementation MAY surface an informational non-blocking diagnostic that the content is unavailable.
ext:repository validators, exporters; repositories with pruned source documents
